item.title: Blog
item.description: Sharpen your defenses with the latest threat insights, industry trends and product updates sure to put you one step ahead of hackers – and your competition.

item.title: How to Evaluate & Invest in a SOC Service
item.description: Looking to invest in a SOC? Blackpoint breaks down the ins and outs of what a Security Operations Center is and how it fits into your growing cybersecurity strategy.

item.title: Blackpoint Ranks #1 in Summer 2021 G2 Report
item.description: Blackpoint ranks #1 in the High Performer category on G2’s Summer 2021 Grid Report. See where we stand amongst other system security software platforms.

item.title: Summer Treat Wave 2021 Is Here!
item.description: We're excited to be co-sponsoring Summer Treat Wave 2021 to recognize the consistent effort MSPs take to be agile and stay ahead of the bad guys.

item.title: Blackpoint Cyber Welcomes Paul Barnes, VP of Product
item.description: Blackpoint welcomes Paul Barnes as VP of Product. Learn more about his 15+ years building strong product strategies to serve the cybersecurity community.

item.title: VMware vCenter Server Security Vulnerability (CVE-2020-3952)
item.description: VMWare issued a warning and patch for vulnerability CVE-2020-3952 in its VMware vCenter Server that maxed out the CVSS rating system by garnering a 10.0

item.title: Critical Microsoft DNS Server Vulnerability (CVE-2020-1350)
item.description: Microsoft has released a patch for a Critical Vulnerability in the Windows DNS Service that can lead to Remote Code Execution (RCE).

item.title: Critical Windows “MS-NRPC” Exploit ZeroLogon (CVE-2020-1472)
item.description: Microsoft issued a security patch for a vulnerability in MS-NRPC that allows attackers to gain domain administrator access to the Active Directory server.

item.title: Critical Vulnerability for SonicWall VPN (CVE-2020-5135)
item.description: According to a Security Advisory released by SonicWall, there are various vulnerabilities which impact SonicWall Network Security Appliances (NSA)

item.title: HAFNIUM Hackers Attack Microsoft Exchange Servers using Multiple Zero-day Vulnerabilities
item.description: Microsoft reports that the state-sponsored group known as HAFNIUM has actively exploited four zero-day vulnerabilities to attack Exchange Server products.

item.title: Significant Increase in Cyber Attacks Targeting Accounting Firms
item.description: Significant Increase in Cyber Attacks Targeting Accounting Firms

item.title: Learn Their Lesson, They Did Not
item.description: This May 4th, let's discuss Star Wars cyber security and some lessons learned for the Galactic Empire's repeatedly failing Death Star plans.

item.title: What are Events, Alerts, and Incidents
item.description: Infosec terminology doesn't have to be confusing. Blackpoint Cyber helps define events, alerts, and incidents from an MSP standpoint.

item.title: Ransomware attack shuts down critical US pipeline
item.description: Major US pipeline was hit with a Darkside ransomware cyber attack resulting in an ongoing network shutdown. Learn how Blackpoint Cyber can protect your MSP!

item.title: 7 Key Cybersecurity Practices for MSPs
item.description: The cybersecurity landscape is always evolving, and MSPs are finding themselves under attack. Blackpoint recommends these 7 cybersecurity best practices!

item.title: Tech Tuesday: Eye Spy – The Dangers of Legal Malware
item.description: What happens when your enterprise-level monitoring software is used maliciously? In our latest Tech Tuesday blog post, Blackpoint's Adversary Pursuit Group dives deep into the malicious activity occurring on a server located in Iran, determined to belong to SecondEye.

item.title: Combatting Industry Myths with MDR Intel
item.description: Industry myths surrounding price, company size, and other solutions can cause apprehension and confusion around MDR solutions. It is important to understand the threat landscape and what types of tools are necessary to protect your business. Read our latest blog to learn more.

item.title: The Core Four for Q4: Change the Way You Do Business
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber kicked off September at DattoCon with four product launches and updates. Driven to create easy products our partners need, we launched managed Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, our first product bundle, MDR for macOS, and a reengineered Vulnerability Scan. Check out this blog to learn more as we round out 2022!

item.title: Blackpoint Overwatch: Executive Summary of Ratting Out Arechclient2
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber recently uncovered an ISO file containing a malicious Windows executable being downloaded to a customer endpoint that wasn’t detected by antivirus. Through the Adversary Pursuit Group’s research, we were able to identify a remote access tool (RAT) being utilized named Arechclient2. To learn more about the APG’s research, read our executive summary.

item.title: Cybersecurity in a Changing Insurance Landscape
item.description: Having data means having cyber risk. Learn how to navigate cyber liability insurance and why Blackpoint RISK - the perfect combination of 24/7 MDR security and cyber insurance for your business.

item.title: Webinar Summary – Compliance + 24/7 MDR: A Match Made in LogIC
item.description: Read our recap of Blackpoint's debut webinar on LogIC, their newest MDR add-on designed to help the MSP community streamline compliance and bolster security.

item.title: Combating Lateral Movement and the Rise of Ransomware
item.description: Blackpoint explains how a 24/7 MDR is positioned to stop lateral movement and detect hidden adversaries before they have the chance to launch their attack.

item.title: Zero-Day Exploit Found in Kaseya VSA
item.description: Zero-Day exploit found in Kaseya VSA. Blackpoint’s 24/7 security operations center (SOC) is actively monitoring the development of this security event.

item.title: Critical Microsoft Print Spooler Service Vulnerability Exposed
item.description: Blackpoint's SOC and patented MDR tech protects MSPs against the recently leaked "PrintNightmare" zero-day vulnerability. Read on for our recommendations.

item.title: LogIC Webinar Summary – Adapt to the Future of Compliance
item.description: Hyper-efficient, simple, and automated. Read here for a recap of Blackpoint Cyber's webinar on LogIC our new MDR add-on!

item.title: Understanding Detection & Response Acronyms
item.description: Cyber threat detection and response are key factors in staying ahead of cybercriminals. Learn how Blackpoint’s 24/7 MDR stacks up against other D&R solutions.

item.title: 5 Ways to Ward Off Ransomware
item.description: For Cybersecurity Awareness Month, Blackpoint shares top 5 ways MSPs can prevent ransomware attacks. Learn how to fight back against rising cyberattacks!

item.title: LogIC Webinar Summary – HIPAA For MSPs
item.description: In this webinar summary Blackpoint and HIPAA experts, Compliancy Group, discuss what MSPs can do to bolster their compliance and cybersecurity posture to help protect clients in healthcare.

item.title: The Blackpoint Cyber Team is Hiring!
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber is looking for driven professionals to join our team! We value quality execution, ownership, and strong morals. Apply now!

item.title: Zero-Day Fireworks: Microsoft’s July Patch Party
item.description: Microsoft released its July 2023 Patch Tuesday updates, featuring 132 vulnerabilities. Six of them are zero days. Learn more from the APG.
